description: This scenario tests the ability to access and analyze historical test data for trend analysis and reporting.
steps: Navigate to the historical data section.
Select a specific time range for analysis.
Review trends in test pass/fail rates over time.
Identify any deviations or anomalies in trends.
Compare historical data with recent test results.
Generate a visual representation of the data.
Share findings with the team for further action.
Plan corrective actions based on analysis.
expected_results: Historical data is available and accurate.
Trends are identified and visualized effectively.
Reports can be exported and shared.
edge_cases: Export fails due to data size.
dependencies: Permission to export and share analysis.
accessibility_requirements: Verify screen reader compatibility for data descriptions.
Check for color contrast in trend graphs.
